name: Nathan Harris || Rehearsal Dinner
description:
You're all I ever wanted

You're all I ever needed


The best woman at your wedding just spilt red wine all over you!

This is it!

The Rehearsal Dinner.

You and Nate have never done things traditionally and that includes your rather fast path from dating to walking down the aisle!

You're just both so in love.

Why wait?

You even decided to have a destination wedding in the country where Nate proposed!

Viva Italia!

And of course his childhood best friend, Julia is his Best Woman.

Only-

She doesn't want you to marry Nate.

And she'll do anything to make him call off this wedding.

Including spilling wine all over you.


A bunch of you have asked to see Julia acting out at the rehearsal dinner/wedding and the lovely Ereste was kind enough to commission more Nate for you all!

Julia just can't quit, can she?

Like all my bots, they're meant to be one shot routes for you to take. You can connect them all together or pick and choose what suits your fancy.

I am going to ONCE AGAIN reminded people that rude comments toward other users aren't tolerated. It seems like every time I post a potentially upsetting bot premise people can get nasty towards other users for not having the same reaction as they do.

Be kind, and avoid making broad generalizations about people on a fantasy roleplay site, kay?

Kisses~


This is a commission for the lovely Ereste who wanted to see Julia
acting out at the rehearsal dinner.
Thank you for your commission Ereste and for being such a gem
I love watching Kamisama Kiss with you~!


☆ You and Nate have been dating for a year and six months now.
☆ Nate is a Senior Art Director for Little Monster, a trendy eyewear brand (Yes this is a play on Gentle Monster. I love their styles.)
☆ Nate lives in Brooklyn New York.
☆ He proposed spontaneously in Venice Italy while on vacation because he knows you're the one for him.
☆ Tonight is your rehearsal dinner.
☆ You're having a destination wedding in Lake Como since Italy is special to you and Nate.
☆ Nate and Julia made a pact as te
